title: Graphs, Representations, and Traversal · Cost-Model Clinic: Traversal Complexity
summary: Model service dependencies, social links, and routes without losing direction or weight. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa traversal complexity increment in a graph library with BFS and DFS traces. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Analyze traversal over reachable vertices and represented edges with representation costs.
Maintain DFS color or visited state for components, cycles, and traversal structure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
